category_sources: Official source page https://mkvtoolnix.download/source.html identifies MKVToolNix as Matroska tools for Linux/Unix and Windows.
source_facts.description says MKVToolNix provides Matroska media file manipulation tools.
display_name_sources: Official site https://mkvtoolnix.download/ styles the project name as MKVToolNix.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted under https://mkvtoolnix.download/doc/ on the same official domain.
Official site navigation at https://mkvtoolnix.download/source.html links to Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official source page https://mkvtoolnix.download/source.html links to the Codeberg Git source code repository and shows git clone https://codeberg.org/mbunkus/mkvtoolnix.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Matroska media file manipulation tools.
source_facts.executables lists mkvmerge, mkvinfo, mkvextract, and mkvpropedit.
